classObjective: Apply the Leg-Leg (LL), Hypotenuse-Angle (HA), Leg-Angle (LA), and Hypotenuse-Leg (HL) theorems to prove right triangles congruent.
workedExamples: 14-5, Example 1 — Write Two-Column Proofs for Right Triangle Congruence Using LL, HA, LA, HL
14-5, Example 2 — Determine Whether Triangles Are Congruent and Name the Theorem
warmUp: What special congruence theorems apply to right triangles?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: LL, HA, LA, HL theorems; when each applies; right triangle congruence shortcuts
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice applying right triangle congruence theorems
independentPractice: Practice problems determining which right triangle congruence theorem applies and proving congruence
assessment: Exit ticket: prove two right triangles are congruent given one leg and the hypotenuse are congruent
capReflection: Why do right triangles have special congruence theorems that other triangles don't need?
